content.body: who is giving the update at plenary next week and how much time do you need?
bakkot volunteered, and probably not more than 5m
oh wait. possibly I misread our minutes
I think what it actually said was that we should include in the update that bakkot volunteered as a maintainer 😄
who volunteered to give the update is not clear
I did not volunteer to give the update and indeed may not be able to make it to the update (meeting starts at the time I am usually taking my child to school)
